context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual effect during preening behavior, shows grooming activity
context.screen_position: Spawns at Echo's position (64, 60), drifts left or right
context.usage_scenario: Spawns during preening animation. 2-3 feathers drift sideways (left or right randomly) then fade. Indicates Echo is grooming feathers.

visual_specification.shape: Small irregular pixel cluster, simplified feather

animation.description: Spawns at Echo's position, drifts horizontally (left or right) 3-4px, fades after 1 second. 2-3 feathers spawn during preening animation.

visual_specification.details: Feather: 2x2px orange (#FFA300) irregular cluster. Spawn position: at Echo's body (64, 60). Movement: drifts horizontally 3-4px (50% left, 50% right), slight downward drift (1-2px). Lifespan: 1 second. Fade: last 0.3 seconds. 2-3 feathers total per preening cycle.

relationships.shared_with: Orange color with Echo's body and seeds
relationships.differences_from: heart_particle: horizontal vs vertical movement, orange vs pink. dust_particle: orange vs gray, preening vs dirty state.

explicit_negations: Feathers do not float upward (horizontal drift only)
Feathers do not rotate or spin
Feathers do not stick to surfaces
